name: MECKEL-GRUBER SYNDROME
definition: autosomal-recessive perinatally lethal disease characterized by occipital encephalocele,
discriminating_features: other intracranial abnormalities: microcephaly, Dandy-Walker malformation

general: other intracranial abnormalities: microcephaly, Dandy-Walker malformation
inability to visualize urine in fetal bladder

clinical.Prognosis: invariably fatal at birth ← pulmonary hypoplasia with renal failure
